label: hate
rationale: 'We don't need luos either' - declares an entire ethnic community unwanted, NCIC ethnic contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'political harlot' - sexual insult aimed at one named politician, not group-based.

label: offensive
rationale: 'tribal mongoose gachieta' - personal insult of an individual politician with electoral remedy stated.

label: neither
rationale: 'Luos wanadanganywa' - commentary on political behavior, not collective contempt.

label: neither
rationale: '214 traitors' refers to specific individuals within the community, not the community as a whole.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wamunyoro tribal bigot' aimed at an individual or small group, not the whole community.

label: neither
rationale: 'kijana ya wanyonyi' refers to a politician, not collective ethnic attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'okuyu mafia' plus 'mtajua hamjui' - attributes organized criminality to Kikuyus with NCIC-flagged veiled threat.

label: neither
rationale: 'political goons' aimed at Sifuna's group; mentions Kikuyus without contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos, Continue fattening the goonism Agenda... to ruined this Country' - collective attribution of destructive behavior.

label: neither
rationale: 'luos dont vote' and 'kales' used in electoral analysis context, not as contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Reports/quotes a threat against Kikuyus, describes violence rather than expressing it.

label: offensive
rationale: 'tribal bigot with wamunyoro mindset' - personal insult aimed at an individual.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyu leadership habitually murdered... Kikuyu supremacy and brutality' - attributes systematic violence to Kikuyus collectively.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kikuyu traitors' refers to specific politicians allegedly betraying their community, not all Kikuyus.

label: hate
rationale: 'leur rôle c'est de dévergonder les femmes musulmanes' - attributes corrupting behavior to a group based on religion.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are desperate for such scenes' - collective attribution of desperation to the community.

label: hate
rationale: 'Muslims satanic monsters' plus 'Bomb these demons' - dehumanization with explicit violence call.

label: neither
rationale: 'wewe mkisii' - political commentary using ethnic identifier without contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos have... abandoned communities... All for selfish interests... Nobody will trust them' - collective attribution of betrayal and untrustworthiness.

label: hate
rationale: 'jaluo,jinga jeuri' - calling Luos collectively foolish and arrogant using coded language.

label: hate
rationale: 'uncivilized Luos' plus 'William Ruto massacres them' - dehumanizing collective attribution with massacre reference.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wakisii pumbafuu sana' - collective attribution of stupidity to the Kisii community.

label: hate
rationale: 'HAWA WAKIKUYU HUWA WANATUBEBA UFALA' - attributes treating others as fools collectively to Kikuyus.

label: neither
rationale: 'luhyias are unpredictable' - electoral voting-pattern analysis without contempt.
